items.name: file-uploader
items.title: Openinary File Uploader
items.description: Secure drag-and-drop file uploader for self-hosted Openinary instances. Uploads with a short-lived presigned signature from POST /upload/sign, no API key in the browser.
items.author: Openinary
items.docs: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_OPENINARY_URL to your Openinary API URL, then create a signing endpoint with @openinary/upload-token. Full guide: https://openinary.dev/docs/guides/file-uploader

items.name: upload-token
items.title: Openinary Upload Signature Helper
items.description: Server-side helper that requests a short-lived presigned upload signature from POST /upload/sign using an Openinary API key.
items.author: Openinary
items.docs: Call signUpload(baseUrl, process.env.OPENINARY_API_KEY, { folder, expiresIn }) from a protected backend route. Never expose your API key to the browser.
